things.name: Brandenburg Gate
things.description: Neoclassical monument and symbol of German reunification at the heart of the capital

things.name: Holocaust Memorial
things.description: Peter Eisenman's profound 2,711-slab memorial to the murdered Jews of Europe

things.name: East Side Gallery
things.description: 1.3km stretch of the Berlin Wall covered in murals by international artists

things.name: Reichstag Building
things.description: Seat of the German parliament with Norman Foster's iconic glass dome, free entry

things.name: Museum Island
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage island with five world-class museums including the Pergamon

things.name: Checkpoint Charlie
things.description: Famous Cold War crossing point between East and West Berlin

things.name: Alexanderplatz
things.description: Iconic East Berlin square with the TV Tower offering 360-degree city views

things.name: Potsdamer Platz
things.description: Rebuilt hub of reunified Berlin with striking modern architecture and Sony Center

things.name: Tempelhof Field
things.description: Former airport converted to a huge public park and venue for urban sports

things.name: Charlottenburg Palace
things.description: Prussia's largest palace with Baroque gardens and exceptional art collections
